cleavage agent: digested with endoproteinase Lys-C and trypsin
collision energy: the analyzer for the MS/MS scans LTQ (37% relative collision energy)
fragmentation method: followed by a data-dependent top 10 MS/MS scans using collision induced dissociation (CID)
instrument: connected the nano electrospray ion source to a LTQ-Orbitrap XL mass spectrometer
ionization type: directly connected the nano electrospray ion source to a LTQ-Orbitrap XL mass spectrometer
labeling: phosphoproteome analysis in B. distachyon seedling leaves was performed to explore the complex protein phosphorylation network
